title: Quebec 16W 2D Square 2-Pin GR8 Cap Compact Fluorescent Lamp, Warm White 3500K, Non-Dimmable CFL Light Bulb, Energy Class A, AC 230V, DD Flat Butterfly Bulb for Flush Mount Ceiling Lighting, 8000 Hours
features: 16W GR10q CFL Bulb: This compact fluorescent light (CFL) bulb delivers exceptional energy efficiency, offering 2000 lumens of warm white light at 3500K, making it an ideal lighting solution for home, office, or commercial spaces. Perfect for anyone looking for an eco-friendly lighting alternative to traditional incandescent bulbs.

Bright & Comfortable Light: The 2000 lumens brightness ensures optimum light output while providing a soft warm white light (3500K) that creates a comfortable ambiance in any room. The flicker-free performance ensures no eye strain or headaches, making it perfect for living rooms, bathrooms, and workspaces. It offers superior color rendering (Ra > 80), providing more vibrant and true-to-life colors.

Energy Class A Efficiency: This 16W CFL bulb offers significant energy savings compared to traditional bulbs, rated Energy Class A. Its long lifespan of up to 8,000 hours ensures reliable performance and reduces the need for frequent replacements, making it a cost-effective lighting option for your home or business.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Made from premium materials, the Quebec GR10q CFL bulb is built to withstand everyday use and environmental factors, ensuring long-term durability and reliability. The robust design of this compact fluorescent light ensures it will continue to perform optimally in high-traffic areas like kitchens, hallways, and corridors. The premium construction also contributes to its flicker-free and no-noise operation.

Large 20x20cm Bulb Size: The GR10q 2-pin CFL bulb features a larger size of 20x20cm, making it suitable for larger ceiling fixtures or lighting installations. It provides ample coverage, ensuring an even spread of light throughout the room. It’s important to note that this bulb is too large to fit into smaller fixtures designed for 16W bulbs. Ensure your light panel or fixture can accommodate the 16W GR10q CFL bulb size before purchasing.

Easy and Secure Installation: The 2-pin DD flat butterfly design makes installation quick and straightforward. With the GR10q 4-pin square push-fit base, the bulb fits securely into compatible 2-pin ballasts, ensuring stable electrical connection and safety. This easy-to-install CFL bulb is a great choice for both homeowners and professionals looking to replace old or worn-out light bulbs in ceiling fixtures, bathroom lights, kitchen lighting, or stairwells. Remember, this bulb requires a ballast to operate.
